channel.title: Powerline radiation sensing on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.description: Recent content in Powerline radiation sensing on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.copyright: ©{year}, NTU IoT Sensing Group. All Rights Reserved

item.title: Sub Topic: Time
item.description: Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation for IoT Functions Sub topic: Time Wearables Clock Synchronization Using Skin Electric Potentials. Application-Layer Clock Synchronization for Wearables Using Skin Electric Potentials Induced by Powerline Radiation. Exploiting Electrical Grid for Accurate and Secure Clock Synchronization. Natural Timestamping Using Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation. Exploiting Power Grid for Accurate and Secure Clock Synchronization in Industrial IoT.

item.title: Sub Topic: Location
item.description: Powerline Electromagnetic Radiation for IoT Functions Sub topic: Location Towards Touch-to-Access Device Authentication Using Induced Body Electric Potentials. Simultaneous Localization and Mapping with Power Network Electromagnetic Field.
